summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Parallel Family Detector integration. Backend APIs work correctly for BTC, ETH, and SOL. Unified detector successfully runs all 3 families (horizontal, converging, parallel) with parallel family being detected as primary for SOL and secondary for BTC. APIs return proper dominant patterns with visual_mode and rejected patterns with reasons.
passed_tests: Pattern V2 BTC API - returns parallel family as secondary, dominant pattern with visual_mode
Pattern V2 ETH API - returns converging family, proper visual_mode
Pattern V2 SOL API - returns parallel family as primary
Unified detector runs all 3 families (horizontal, converging, parallel)
API returns dominant patterns with visual_mode
API returns rejected patterns with reasons
Parallel family detector integration - detected in BTC (secondary) and SOL (primary)
Pattern classification system working with multiple families
